name: openclaw-goal-command
description: Closed-loop /goal command with judge model, triple budget tracking, subgoals, completion audit, and Obsidian sync. Synthesizes Hermes, Claude-Goal, Codex, and brasco05.

scripts.test: node tests/classify.test.mjs && node tests/judge.test.mjs && node tests/budget.test.mjs
